case_title: OCEAN BEACH APARTMENTS vs. SMITH, MICHEL et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT. 5, JUDGE WICK, CSR BRENDA FIELDS, CLERK E.MONTI C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, KEITH STEVENS. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. ORAL & DOC. EVID. PRE- SENTED. CASE SUBMITED. EXHIBITS RETAINED.
